name: Toutiao MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Toutiao — ByteDance's flagship Chinese content platform and news aggregator with over 300M active users. Enables AI agents to search Toutiao articles, retrieve trending content, access news feeds, and monitor Chinese digital media — supporting content research and social listening for the Chinese market.
use_cases: Searching Toutiao articles and trending news from content research agents
Monitoring Chinese digital media trends from marketing intelligence agents
Retrieving Toutiao content for market research from business intelligence agents
Tracking brand mentions and industry news on Toutiao from analysis agents
not_for: Non-Chinese content monitoring (use international news MCPs)
Posting or managing Toutiao content (read-focused — verify write capabilities)
Teams without Chinese market focus — Toutiao content is primarily Chinese language
best_when: A business team targeting the Chinese market wants AI agents to monitor Toutiao trends, search content, and track brand mentions in China's largest content platform.
avoid_when: You target non-Chinese markets. Community tool — not official ByteDance/Toutiao integration. CN data residency and access restrictions apply.

auth.notes: Toutiao API credentials may be required depending on endpoints used. Some public endpoints may work without auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Some public Toutiao endpoints accessible without auth
pricing.paid_tiers: Toutiao API commercial access for higher rate limits
pricing.notes: Community MCP server is free. Toutiao API access terms apply — review ByteDance developer policies.

known_agent_gotchas: Community scraping tool — Toutiao may rate limit or block aggressive API access
CN data residency — data processed by ByteDance infrastructure in China
Documentation primarily in Chinese — limited English guidance
Not official ByteDance integration — API endpoints may change without notice
agent_readiness.security_notes: CN data residency via ByteDance. HTTPS. Community tool using public/unofficial Toutiao APIs — review ToS before production use.

security_score_components.security_notes: ByteDance/CN data. Unofficial API usage — review ToS. HTTPS. Community tool.
